industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Falck Renewables S.p.A.
summary: Falck Renewables S.p.A., together with its subsidiaries, develops, designs, builds, and manages plants that generate clean energy. The company operates wind energy, biomass energy, waste-to-energy, and photovoltaic energy plants, as well as storage systems. It also provides renewable energy production facilities management services; and engineering and consulting services to develop projects for electricity generation primarily in solar and wind energy sectors. As of December 31, 2019, the company had an installed capacity of approximately 1086.3 MW. It operates in Italy, the United Kingdom, Germany, France, Spain, the United States, Japan, Sweden,  Mexico, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Actelios SpA and changed its name to Falck Renewables S.p.A. in August 2010. Falck Renewables S.p.A. was founded in 2002 and is based in Milan, Italy.  Falck Renewables S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Falck SpA.
